3232720.name: ONEFISTZONE Demo
3232720.description:
Cyborg fights are all the rage and the cyborg mafia is taking over the world.
Just a toe or so into the future.

Yahiro Akiko was born with monstrous physical abilities.
One chance led her to the world of underground fighting. ......
From there, the wheels of her life begin to turn.

What lies beyond the release of violence, is it destruction or glory? Glory?
You can play the first 30 minutes of the full version.
For now, the demo version is a story without branches.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
